

## Request Devices


<form>
<div class="mb-3 row" style = "max-width : 200px;">
<div>
<label for="name" class="form-label">Name</label>
<input type="name" class="form-control co" id="name" placeholder="Firstname Lastname...">

<label for="name" class="form-label">Room</label>
<input type="name" class="form-control" id="name" placeholder="4-digit Room Number...">
</div>
</form>
